message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Dorado. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Frozen Phoenix into Celestial Cyclops.
I can evolve Celestial Cyclops into Crystal Owlbear.
I can evolve Mystic Chimera into Solar Djinn.
I can evolve Solar Djinn into Infernal Chimera.
I can evolve Arcane Serpent into Thunder Drake.
I can evolve Thunder Drake into Void Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Golem into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Void Chimera into Wild Owlbear.
I can evolve Infernal Manticore into Mystic Wolf.
I can evolve Mystic Wolf into Wild Wolf.
I can evolve Infernal Basilisk into Mystic Phoenix.
I can evolve Mystic Phoenix into Arcane Golem.
I can evolve Wild Basilisk into Infernal Specter.
I can evolve Infernal Specter into Shadow Tiger.
I can evolve Crystal Specter into Wild Phoenix.
I can evolve Wild Phoenix into Arcane Serpent.
I can evolve Thunder Hydra into Shadow Phoenix.
I can evolve Shadow Phoenix into Shadow Drake.
I can evolve Thunder Golem into Shadow Wyvern.
I can evolve Shadow Wyvern into Astral Hydra.
I can evolve Solar Chimera into Shadow Titan.
I can evolve Shadow Titan into Mystic Owlbear.
I can evolve Storm Hydra into Lunar Specter.
I can evolve Lunar Specter into Ancient Minotaur.
I can evolve Frozen Djinn into Void Minotaur.
I can evolve Void Minotaur into Thunder Basilisk.
I can evolve Astral Owlbear into Shadow Titan.
I can evolve Shadow Titan into Ancient Leviathan.
I can evolve Astral Hydra into Frozen Djinn.
I can evolve Frozen Djinn into Mystic Minotaur.
I can evolve Astral Griffin into Astral Djinn.
I can evolve Astral Djinn into Shadow Phoenix.

I can evolve Shadow Hydra into Shadow Titan.
I can evolve Shadow Titan into Solar Cyclops.
I can evolve Lunar Wolf into Void Cyclops.

I can evolve Lunar Djinn into Ancient Minotaur.
I can evolve Ancient Minotaur into Celestial Golem.
I can evolve Crystal Cyclops into Frozen Chimera.
I can evolve Frozen Chimera into Infernal Titan.
I can evolve Wild Leviathan into Lunar Minotaur.
I can evolve Lunar Minotaur into Shadow Titan.
I can evolve Infernal Hydra into Lunar Kraken.
I can evolve Lunar Kraken into Void Chimera.
I can evolve Shadow Specter into Shadow Tiger.
I can evolve Shadow Tiger into Crystal Chimera.
I can evolve Frozen Golem into Lunar Djinn.
I can evolve Lunar Djinn into Solar Leviathan.
I can evolve Solar Titan into Crystal Hydra.
I can evolve Crystal Hydra into Crystal Griffin.

I can evolve Storm Minotaur into Mystic Golem.
I can evolve Mystic Golem into Solar Minotaur.
Choose a beast evolution.
